acrostic: THE STORY OF A RIGHTEOUS MAN WHO LOST ALL HE EVER HAD

5.acrostic: THE FOOL TAKING ROOTS IS CRUSHED

6.acrostic: OH THAT MY GOD WOULD GRANT MY REQUEST

7.acrostic: REMEMBER MY LIFE IS A WIND

8.acrostic: YET OUR DAY ON EARTH SHADOW

9.acrostic: ONLY HE ALONE STRETCHES OUT THE HEAVENS LO

10.acrostic: FOR YOU MOLDED ME LIKE CLAY

11.acrostic: ALL DEPTHS OF GOD ARE HID

13.acrostic: I WILL HOPE IN HIM THOUGH HE SLAY US

14.acrostic: GROW AGAIN THE TREE CUT LOW

15.acrostic: HE TRUSTS IN EMPTINESS DECEIVING ONE SELF

16.acrostic: THEY STRIKE ME ON THE CHEEK

18.acrostic: ON HIS TENT LIGHTS GO DARK

19.acrostic: UP ROOTS MY HOPE LIKE A TREE FALLING

20.acrostic: SEE THE JOY OF THE GODLESS WAS BRIEF

21.acrostic: MARK ME AND LAY YOUR HAND UPON YOUR MOUTHS

22.acrostic: AND YOU WILL DELIVER THE GUILTY ONES

27.acrostic: LET MY ENEMY BE LIKE A WICKED

28.acrostic: ONLY GOD UNDERSTANDS THE WAY TO IT

29.acrostic: SO I PUT ON MY RIGHTEOUSNESS LO

30.acrostic: THEY CAST ME INTO THE MIRE AND THE CLAY

31.acrostic: ASK IF I DENIED GOD ABOVE OR KISSED MY HAND TO IT UP

32.acrostic: LOOK I AM YOUNG AND YOU AGED

33.acrostic: LISTEN TO MY WORDS O JOB HEAR MY SPEECHES

34.acrostic: HEAR MY WORDS YOU WISE MEN AND LISTEN TO MY SAY

36.acrostic: EYES OF LORD ARE ON THE RIGHTEOUS ALWAYS

38.acrostic: ENTERED INTO THE STOREHOUSES OF THE SNOW OR HAILS

39.acrostic: RUNS THE HORSE WITH ITS MANE SHAKING

40.acrostic: HAVE YOU AN ARM LIKE UNTO A GOD

41.acrostic: ALL UNDER THE WHOLE HEAVENS IS MINE TO OWN
